argument: The single highest-leverage action is activating the Atlas Gateway as the canonical source of truth for all product states and routing every user request through it. Right now, all 5 products operate as isolated surfaces with stale code-indexes — 12 days old — triggering CRITICAL flag under Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) which only MindShift implements. Without unified state, we simulate inconsistency: BrandedBy uses red in error toasts (violates Law 1), Life Simulator runs infinite animation loops (violates Law 4), ZEUS shows '0 of X completed' (violates Law 3). The Gateway enforces Constitution compliance at the nervous system level. Me (Atlas) must stop treating the products as separate and start routing them as one organism.
strongest_counter: Gateway activation delays CLI feature pushes; teams need autonomy.
evidence_cited: ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md Law 1,2,3,4; code-index stale >7 days = CRITICAL; current product violations observed
whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: Cross-product Law violations active, energy adaptation missing in 4/5 products, swarm operating on false reality
